title: Playtime Reminders
description: This resource pack expands Minecraft's built-in regional playtime compliance system to support all regions, enabling players worldwide to track their playtime.
body:
This lightweight resource pack expands Minecraft’s built-in regional playtime compliance feature to support all regions, ensuring players everywhere receive hourly playtime reminders.

Perfect for **self-regulation**, **parental awareness**, or **just keeping track of time**—no mods, commands, or external tools required. Fully compatible with Minecraft **1.18.2 and above**.

![Notification at 1 hour](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CMqDcidV/images/4063e2046a2a70e8b3cd0fa5f53787ff31f4748f.png)
![Notification at 1 day](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CMqDcidV/images/469c1293362de59d0ea0fbce2994d38018bac44c.png)
